indicators.name: unobstructed floor area
indicators.rationale: The floor is clear of any furniture obstruction, allowing for free movement.

indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring provides a smooth, non-slip base suitable for yoga mat placement.

indicators.name: minimal clutter in movement zone
indicators.rationale: The near-total absence of furniture or objects on the floor is the key spatial prerequisite for safe yoga practice.

indicators.name: natural light from large window
indicators.rationale: Natural light creates a calm, energising environment appropriate for mindful movement practice.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for yoga / stretching. While it has an unobstructed floor area and minimal clutter, the presence of furniture and the lack of a dedicated yoga area make it less than ideal. The natural light is a positive aspect, but the overall layout does not fully support the activity.
